cadences.name: Monthly development update
cadences.fallbackChannel: release notes or pinned status post
includes: what shipped since the last update
links to MASTER_ROADMAP.md, docs/STATUS_MATRIX.md, and docs/CHANGELOG_PUBLIC.md
cadences.starterTemplate:
# Monthly development update — <month year>

## Headline
<one sentence about what moved>

## Shipped
- <2-5 bullets>

## In progress
- <1-3 bullets>

## Blockers / external dependencies
- <only real blockers>

## Next up
- <next roadmap focus>

## Links
- Roadmap: `MASTER_ROADMAP.md`
- Status matrix: `docs/STATUS_MATRIX.md`
- Public changelog: `docs/CHANGELOG_PUBLIC.md`
- Relevant docs: <link only what changed>

cadences.name: Release notes
cadences.frequency: per public tag or milestone-level update
includes: compatibility or verification notes if relevant
links to deeper docs and changelog entries
cadences.starterTemplate:
# Release notes — <tag or milestone>

## Headline
<one sentence about the shipped slice>

## Scope
- <what this release covers>

## User-visible docs / trust changes
- <2-5 bullets>

## Compatibility / verification notes
- <only if relevant>

## Links
- Public changelog: `docs/CHANGELOG_PUBLIC.md`
- Roadmap: `MASTER_ROADMAP.md`
- Status matrix: `docs/STATUS_MATRIX.md`
- Deep links: <specific docs>

cadences.name: Trust-surface change notice
cadences.frequency: when public trust boundaries materially change
cadences.starterTemplate:
# Trust-surface update — <date or short label>

## What changed
- <brief change summary>

## Why it matters
- <why contributors/users should care>

## Updated docs
- <direct links to changed docs>

rules: Keep public updates aligned with MASTER_ROADMAP.md and docs/STATUS_MATRIX.md
Do not include secrets, private infra details, signer operations, or operator-only incident handling
Keep milestone names consistent across release notes, changelog entries, and roadmap/status updates
